findings.title: No input validation on API request bodies
findings.description: All 11 API route files accept raw JSON from c.req.json() without schema validation. While this is a local-first app (no remote attack surface by default), when running with pnpm server or pnpm dev:full the Hono server binds to a port. Malformed or oversized payloads could trigger unexpected behavior in core services or SQLite. This overlaps with DX-R5-02 but has a security dimension.
findings.fix: Add Zod validation middleware to all routes that accept request bodies. Especially critical for ai.ts (streaming chat) and plugins.ts (plugin install from URL).
